AgentSnitch
quiet
⏸ Paused — sensing halted. Agent activity during the pause is not being observed or recorded. Click Live to resume.

Run Claude Code normally after hooks are installed.
All local • session in memory
Settings
Advanced: experimental Network Extension sensor
Loading

Expert-only ground-truth attribution path. The default install uses semantic hooks plus NetworkStatistics/process-tree correlation, with lsof fallback.

Warning: this installs a macOS system network extension and content filter. Disable it immediately if you experience any connectivity issues.
